title: oxalis nipponica subsp. nipponica
intro: Oxalis nipponica subsp. nipponica, commonly known as Japanese wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oxalis nipponica subsp. nipponica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
